sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16176" key="a)sqeno/fqalmon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσθεν-όφθαλμον</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ζῴδιον,</foreign> of the Ram, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Rhetor.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.194.2</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.166.19</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
